title: Vanilla+ Verticals
description: Mod adding vertical slabs & stairs to all vanilla blocks.
body:
![vanilla+ collection image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bfa83c3ccb92f7b64845d30ad633f8952b18d43.png)
## GENERAL
**Vanilla+ Verticals** Mod is adding vertical slabs and stairs (connectible to normal stairs) to almost every block in Minecraft. This mod is part of a **[Vanilla+ Mod Collection](https://modrinth.com/organization/vanilla+-collection)** covering most branches of Vanilla Minecraft.
## OTHER MODS
